name: io.github.bierlingm/spikes
description: UI feedback for AI-assisted building. Click elements, rate them, agents triage via MCP.

environmentVariables.description: Bearer token for the hosted Spikes API. Required only when using --remote mode against spikes.sh. Local mode reads .spikes/feedback.jsonl and needs no token.
environmentVariables.name: SPIKES_TOKEN

environmentVariables.description: Override the Spikes API base URL. Defaults to https://spikes.sh/api. Useful for self-hosted Spikes workers.
environmentVariables.name: SPIKES_API_URL
